subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Upon beholding the graceful page which mirroreth the countenance of the firm ones in the Covenant and the tender youth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از مشاهده صفحه لطیف که آاینه شمائل ثابت میثاق و نونهالان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
